title: Deterministic Tests, Fault Injection, Contract Evidence, and Observability · Automation and Data Client Systems
description: A data client needs injected openers, local HTTP fixtures, fake clocks, malformed and partial bodies, contract checks, and privacy-safe telemetry. Learners cumulatively produce a Python 3.14 urllib and HTTP client layers fault-injected client verification harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Test request construction and response handling with an injected deterministic transport and sanitized fixtures. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Use a local test server for protocol integration while controlling redirects, delays, truncation, TLS, and cleanup. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Verify documented provider and consumer contracts against changed schemas, status codes, and version boundaries. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
